UserPermission.title: UserPermission
UserPermission.description: Represents a user's permissions and assigned company within the M-FLEM Pro system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserPermission entity.

role.description: System role assigned to the user.

assignedCompany.description: The name of the company the user is assigned to.

BuildingInfo.title: BuildingInfo
BuildingInfo.description: Stores core physical information and dimensions for a specific plant building.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingInfo entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company this building information belongs to. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

plantName.description: The name of the plant this building information describes. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

latitude.description: Geographic latitude of the plant location.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude of the plant location.

fabAboveLevel.description: Number of factory (FAB) floors above ground level.

fabBelowLevel.description: Number of factory (FAB) floors below ground level (basement levels).

cupAboveLevel.description: Number of central utility plant (CUP) floors above ground level.

cupBelowLevel.description: Number of central utility plant (CUP) floors below ground level (basement levels).

PlantInitialValue.title: PlantInitialValue
PlantInitialValue.description: Records the initial estimated asset values for different categories within a specific plant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlantInitialValue entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company to which these initial values apply. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

plantName.description: The name of the plant for which these initial values are recorded. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

buildingValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for the building structure.

facilityValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for facilities.

toolsValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for tools.

fixtureValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for fixtures.

stockValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for stock.

bi12mValue.description: Initial estimated asset value (in USD millions) for business interruption (12 months).

FabCleanroomOccupancy.title: FabCleanroomOccupancy
FabCleanroomOccupancy.description: Captures overall and floor-specific cleanroom occupancy ratios for a plant's FAB area.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FabCleanroomOccupancy entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company associated with this cleanroom occupancy data. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

plantName.description: The name of the plant for which cleanroom occupancy data is recorded. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

overallFacilityCleanroomRatio.description: The overall cleanroom ratio for facilities across the entire plant (0-1).

overallToolsCleanroomRatio.description: The overall cleanroom ratio for tools across the entire plant (0-1).

fabCleanroomFloorRatioIds.description: References to FabCleanroomFloorRatio entities, detailing occupancy ratios for individual floors. (Relationship: FabCleanroomOccupancy 1:N FabCleanroomFloorRatio)

FabCleanroomFloorRatio.title: FabCleanroomFloorRatio
FabCleanroomFloorRatio.description: Defines the facility and cleanroom occupancy ratios for a specific floor within a FAB area.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FabCleanroomFloorRatio entity.

fabCleanroomOccupancyId.description: Reference to the parent FabCleanroomOccupancy entity. (Relationship: FabCleanroomOccupancy 1:N FabCleanroomFloorRatio)

floorIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the floor (e.g., "L10" for Level 10, "BL20" for Basement Level 2).

facilityOccupancyRatio.description: The facility occupancy ratio for this specific floor (relative distribution).

cleanroomOccupancyRatio.description: The cleanroom occupancy ratio for this specific floor (relative distribution).

BuildingValueRatio.title: BuildingValueRatio
BuildingValueRatio.description: Stores the validated asset value distribution ratios per floor for a plant building.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingValueRatio entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company to which these building value ratios apply. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

plantName.description: The name of the plant for which building value ratios are defined. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

validationStatus.description: The validation status of the asset value ratios (e.g., 'VALIDATED').

buildingValueFloorRatioIds.description: References to BuildingValueFloorRatio entities, detailing asset distribution for individual floors. (Relationship: BuildingValueRatio 1:N BuildingValueFloorRatio)

BuildingValueFloorRatio.title: BuildingValueFloorRatio
BuildingValueFloorRatio.description: Defines the asset value distribution ratios for a specific floor within a building.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingValueFloorRatio entity.

buildingValueRatioId.description: Reference to the parent BuildingValueRatio entity. (Relationship: BuildingValueRatio 1:N BuildingValueFloorRatio)

floorIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the floor (e.g., "FAB L10", "CUP Total").

buildingRatio.description: The proportion of overall building value attributed to this floor (0-1).

facilityRatio.description: The proportion of overall facility value attributed to this floor (0-1).

toolsRatio.description: The proportion of overall tools value attributed to this floor (0-1).

fixtureRatio.description: The proportion of overall fixture value attributed to this floor (0-1).

FloodLossEstimation.title: FloodLossEstimation
FloodLossEstimation.description: Records parameters and results of a flood loss estimation for a specific plant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FloodLossEstimation entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company for which this estimation was made. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

plantName.description: The name of the plant for which this estimation was made. (Used as part of a composite key for a plant).

l10Height.description: The L10 height (elevation reference point in meters) used for the estimation.

floodHeightAgl.description: The flood height above ground level (in meters) used for the estimation.

buildingBasementLossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for building assets in basement levels (0-100).

buildingL10LossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for building assets at L10 level (0-100).

toolsBasementLossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for tool assets in basement levels (0-100).

toolsL10LossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for tool assets at L10 level (0-100).

ffsBasementLossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for facility, fixture, and stock assets in basement levels (0-100).

ffsL10LossRatio.description: Suggested or adjusted loss ratio (%) for facility, fixture, and stock assets at L10 level (0-100).

estimatedTotalLoss.description: The calculated total flood loss estimate in USD millions.

estimationTimestamp.description: The date and time when this flood loss estimation was performed.

definition.description: Stores user permissions, role, and assigned company. `userId` corresponds to the authenticated user's Firebase UID. This serves as the source of truth for DBAC and is used to populate custom claims for `assignedCompany` and `role` to facilitate authorization independence in security rules.
Stores core physical information and dimensions for a specific plant building. Includes denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields for tenant-based authorization and QAPs.

params.name: buildingInfoId
params.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingInfo document.

definition.description: Records the initial estimated asset values for different categories within a specific plant. Includes denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields for tenant-based authorization and QAPs.

params.name: plantInitialValueId
params.description: Unique identifier for the PlantInitialValue document.

definition.description: Captures overall cleanroom occupancy ratios for a plant's FAB area. Includes denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields for tenant-based authorization and QAPs.

params.name: fabCleanroomOccupancyId
params.description: Unique identifier for the FabCleanroomOccupancy document.

definition.description: Defines facility and cleanroom occupancy ratios for a specific floor within a FAB area. CRITICAL: For authorization independence, documents in this subcollection MUST include denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields, copied from the parent `FabCleanroomOccupancy` document.

params.name: fabCleanroomOccupancyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent FabCleanroomOccupancy document.

params.name: fabCleanroomFloorRatioId
params.description: Unique identifier for the FabCleanroomFloorRatio document.

definition.description: Stores the validated asset value distribution ratios per floor for a plant building. Includes denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields for tenant-based authorization and QAPs.

params.name: buildingValueRatioId
params.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingValueRatio document.

definition.description: Defines the asset value distribution ratios for a specific floor within a building. CRITICAL: For authorization independence, documents in this subcollection MUST include denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields, copied from the parent `BuildingValueRatio` document.

params.name: buildingValueRatioId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent BuildingValueRatio document.

params.name: buildingValueFloorRatioId
params.description: Unique identifier for the BuildingValueFloorRatio document.

definition.description: Records parameters and results of a flood loss estimation for a specific plant. Includes denormalized `companyName` and `plantName` fields for tenant-based authorization and QAPs.

params.name: floodLossEstimationId
params.description: Unique identifier for the FloodLossEstimation document.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to be highly secure, scalable, and debuggable, strictly adhering to the core design principles. The primary strategy for authorization is **Authorization Independence via Denormalization** for multi-tenancy and nested data access.

All top-level collections representing core plant data (`/building_info`, `/plant_initial_values`, `/fab_cleanroom_occupancy`, `/building_value_ratios`, `/flood_loss_estimations`) explicitly contain `companyName` and `plantName` fields. This denormalization is critical for two reasons:
1.  **Authorization Independence:** It eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules to ascertain the owning company of a plant. Rules can directly check `request.auth.token.assignedCompany == resource.data.companyName`, ensuring atomic operations and simplifying rule logic.
2.  **QAPs (Queries as Authorization Policies):** This structure naturally supports secure `list` operations. Client applications can query a collection with a `where('companyName', '==', userAssignedCompany)` clause, and security rules can efficiently validate that the requested `companyName` matches the authenticated user's assigned company from their custom token, thereby preventing data leakage.

For nested entities (`FabCleanroomFloorRatio`, `BuildingValueFloorRatio`), which are stored as subcollections (`/fab_cleanroom_occupancy/{fabCleanroomOccupancyId}/floor_ratios` and `/building_value_ratios/{buildingValueRatioId}/floor_ratios` respectively), `companyName` and `plantName` are **denormalized and copied** from their parent documents into each subcollection document. This is crucial for maintaining Authorization Independence for subcollection items, allowing their security rules to operate without requiring `get()` calls to their parent documents.

**Structural Segregation** is maintained by ensuring each collection has a homogeneous security posture. For example, all documents in `/building_info` are accessible by users assigned to the `companyName` specified within the document, according to their role. User-specific permissions are managed in a dedicated `/user_permissions` collection, which serves as the source of truth for DBAC (Database-Backed Access Control). It is assumed that a custom Firebase Authentication token, containing `assignedCompany` and `role` as custom claims (populated from `user_permissions`), is minted upon user login to enable efficient and independent rule evaluations without frequent `get()` calls to the `user_permissions` collection within every rule evaluation.

Path-based ownership is utilized for `user_permissions` where the `userId` directly corresponds to `request.auth.uid`. For company-owned data, while not strictly path-based ownership in the sense of `/companies/{companyId}/data`, the `companyName` field acts as the primary access control mechanism, effectively creating a multi-tenant separation validated by security rules.

This design prioritizes clarity, debuggability, and performance by front-loading authorization context into the documents themselves, thus avoiding complex and costly `get()` operations in Firestore Security Rules and enabling robust QAPs.
